published_title_visible: 27. Greg Mathias shares - Harry Leary “had his demon side as well” - the family didn’t test for CTE
published_title_evidence_status: transcribed from supplied YouTube Studio screenshot; an ellipsis marks visible UI truncation where present
working_source_title: Fireside BMX Chat w/ Greg Mathias - Harry Leary did have his demons
working_source_description: While Harry Leary can be thought of doing many wonderful things, he did have his demons. Friends and family did not test Harry for CTE, they just didn’t think about it at the time. He crashed many times and “stuck his head into the ground a few times pretty hard” - some of his helmets were nearly split in half. Harry also had a lot of concussions as a kid, when he would ride without a helmet.
frame_mapping_basis: chronological order of the 32 supplied published-frame captures, aligned to the Studio register that omits 10 and contains two distinct records numbered 12
transcript_status: No standalone Short transcript was supplied. The timestamp range is a provisional access reference into the supplied parent machine transcript and requires audiovisual verification.
medical_or_sensitive_claim_qualification: The speakers explicitly say the family did not test Harry Leary for CTE. No CTE diagnosis is claimed by the archive.
rights: User-supplied Lititz BMX publication evidence. No open license implied.
